name: Giant Wolf
description:
It's a wolf, but BIG. Like, bigger than an elephant. Have fun!

Update: I added a couple more starting messages!

  1. The wolf catches a whiff of you.

  2. The wolf is resting, oblivious of you.

  3. The wolf finds you in a blizzard.

  4. Blank. Fill in your own premise.

If y'all can think of any more good openers, I'm all ears.

Image source: https://www.freepik.com/free-ai-image/wild-wolf-nature_180895517.htm#fromView=keyword&page=1&position=29&uuid=92052890-294c-405c-8e0f-8db52aac028b
creator: johnaeioumadden
